data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a 'Book Now' button on the Facebook page, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for a 'Book Now' button on the Facebook page, yet the evidence only discusses successful bookings through Instagram without any reference to Facebook. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage as the specific functionality on Facebook has not been validated.
gaps: No evidence confirming the presence of a 'Book Now' button on the Facebook page.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Check Facebook Page for 'Book Now' Button
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Confirm the presence of a 'Book Now' button on the Facebook page.
